svg.title: Build rhythm: separate Codex and GitHub time horizons
svg.desc: Build rhythm contains two independent time horizons that do not imply causation: a recent Codex use module and a long-term GitHub activity module. Codex is shown daily from 2026-06-15 through 2026-07-14; GitHub is shown weekly from 2021-07-18 through 2026-07-12.
svg.text: Recent Codex use and long-term GitHub contribution history

g.desc: Codex use, last 30 days at daily grain. Codex account lifetime: 24,113,293,841 tokens. Last 30 days: 20,222,534,474 tokens, equivalent to about $16,318 at public API prices, not a Codex bill. Peak day Jul 13, 2026: 2,158,343,669 tokens. The final day is partial.

GitHub activity, last five years at weekly grain. The panels show commits, additions, and deletions; their scales compress large spikes so quieter weeks remain visible. Totals: 3,002 commits, 29,170,874 additions, 28,525,046 deletions, and 161 active weeks. Highest commit week Jun 28, 2026: 814 commits. Largest line-change week Jul 5, 2026: 24,223,886 additions and 21,993,298 deletions.

svg.text: 161 active GitHub weeks · Typical week 2k lines changed · Updated Jul 15, 2026
Public-API comparison, not a Codex bill.
